evals.prompt: Deploy the invoice-approval.bpmn file to my Camunda cluster.
evals.expected_output: Runs c8 deploy command for the BPMN file
expectations: Uses c8 deploy command with the correct file path
Verifies deployment success by listing process definitions

evals.prompt: Deploy my process and start an instance with orderId=ORD-456 and amount=2500.
evals.expected_output: Deploys the process and creates an instance with the specified variables
expectations: Creates a process instance with correct variables JSON
Uses c8 run or c8 deploy followed by c8 create pi

evals.prompt: Check if my latest deployment of the InvoiceApproval process succeeded and what version it is.
evals.expected_output: Lists process definitions and finds the latest version
expectations: Uses c8 list pd or c8 search pd to find the process
Shows the version number and deployment status
